name: coordination-surfaces-semantic-map
description: Interpretive semantic map of recurring coordination surfaces across Ethereum. This does not represent a canonical protocol architecture or a strict execution sequence.

surfaces.label: Order Flow Access
surfaces.description: Transaction origination, exposure, and routing prior to execution coordination.

surfaces.label: Solver Coordination
surfaces.description: Intent solving, execution path selection, and outcome optimization.

surfaces.label: Builder Coordination
surfaces.description: Execution payload construction and proposer-builder coordination prior to inclusion.

surfaces.label: Inclusion
surfaces.description: Protocol-enforced inclusion constraints and censorship-resistance mechanisms.

surfaces.label: Commitments
surfaces.description: Preconfirmation commitments and early execution guarantees prior to inclusion.

surfaces.label: Preconfirmations
surfaces.description: Latency-sensitive execution assurances and user-facing guarantees before final settlement.

surfaces.label: Finality
surfaces.description: Consensus settlement and transition from probabilistic inclusion to irreversible final state.

notes: This map is interpretive and semantic, not canonical.
Surfaces may overlap and should not be read as a rigid linear pipeline.
Ambiguous terms such as execution coordination are intentionally excluded from the main surface model.
